subject: feat(theme): add DaisyUI design tokens (radius, border) and replace hardcoded values
body:
Add non-color DaisyUI design tokens that vary per theme (cupcake has
pill-shaped inputs with 2rem radius + 2px borders, others use 0.5rem
radius + 1px borders).

Infrastructure:
- global.css: Add --radius-selector, --radius-field, --radius-box,
  --border to all 6 @variant blocks
- lib/themeColors.ts: Add ThemeTokens interface and THEME_TOKENS lookup
  with px values for RN inline styles
- hooks/useTheme.ts: Expose tokens in hook return value

Component updates (hardcoded → token):
- BubbleContent.tsx: borderRadius: 20 → tokens.radiusBox + 4
- ComposeBar.tsx: borderRadius: 24 → tokens.radiusField
- ToneSelector.tsx: borderRadius: 12 → tokens.radiusField (2 places)
- ChatListItem.tsx: borderRadius: 16 → tokens.radiusBox (via createCardStyles)
- home.tsx: borderRadius: 12/16 → tokens.radiusField/tokens.radiusBox
- DesktopLayout.tsx: borderRadius values → tokens
- app/(app)/_layout.tsx: borderRadius: 16 → tokens.radiusBox

Tags: theme, design-tokens, daisyui, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: minor
